videoSnippet.title: Is It Possible? || Pranesh vs Gukesh || Chennai Grand Masters 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Pranesh M (2666) - Gukesh D (2717)
Quantbox Chennai Grand Masters 2026 (Chess.com) [06] 2026.07.20
B12 Caro-Kann, advance variation

1.e4 c6 2.d4 d5 3.e5 Bf5 4.Nd2 e6 5.Nb3 Nd7 6.h4 h6 7.Ne2 Ne7 8.Ng3 Bh7 9.Be3 c5 10.Nxc5 Nxc5 11.dxc5 Nc6 12.c3 Nxe5 13.Qa4+ Nc6 14.Bb5 Qd7 15.O-O-O a6 16.Nh5 O-O-O 17.Be2 e5 18.b4 d4 19.cxd4 exd4 20.Nf4 Qc7 21.Bd2 Nxb4 22.Kb2 Nc6 23.Bd3 Bxc5 24.Bxh7 Rxh7 25.Nd3 Rd5 26.Qc4 Qd6 27.Bf4 Ba3+ 28.Ka1 Qd7 29.Rb1 b5 30.Qb3 b4 31.Qc4 Kd8 32.Nc5 Qf5 33.Nb7+ Kd7 34.g4 Qe4 35.Rhe1 Qf3 36.Rb3 Qxf4 37.Qxd5+ Kc7 38.Rf3 Bb2+ 39.Kb1
